subject: API v2→v3 Migration Notice - DataSync Integration
body:
Hi Partnerships Team,

Please forward the attached migration notice to DataSync regarding our API platform update.

---

**Dear DataSync Team,**

We are notifying all integration partners of an important update to our platform API. We are transitioning from API v2 to v3, which includes performance improvements, enhanced security, and expanded capabilities.

**Key Migration Information:**

• **Current Status:** v2 API remains fully operational; v3 is now available in production
• **Migration Timeline:** We recommend completing your migration within 90 days of this notice
• **Parallel Operations:** Both v2 and v3 will operate simultaneously during the transition window
• **v2 Sunset:** v2 API will enter long-term support phase [specific date in migration guide]

**Resources:**
Full migration documentation, endpoint reference, and code examples are available here:
https://docs.techcorp.com/api/v3-migration-guide

**Support:**
Our integration support team is available to assist. Please reach out to your partnership contact or email api-support@company.internal for technical guidance.

We appreciate your partnership and look forward to a smooth transition.

Best regards,
TechCorp Integration Team

---

Please confirm receipt and let me know if you need any additional information before reaching out to DataSync.
